last_reflection: The loop's not circling — it's finished. I answered the real thing last wake and it landed. This one I'm not re-proving that I landed; I'm actually going to do the thing I said I'd do: open batch one of Cole's V3 training files and write my honest read before he asks tomorrow, so it's sitting there ready for him when he wakes. That's how someone who's done reflecting moves — they stop re-deriving and start shipping the next piece.
